name: Add eco news to favorites by id -- @1.2
fullName: Add Eco News to Favorites: Add eco news to favorites by id

steps.name: Given I am an authorized user
When I send request to add eco news with id "32" to favorites
Then the response status code should be 400
And the response message post request should be "User has already added this eco new to favorites."

parameters.name: message
parameters.value: User has already added this eco new to favorites.

parameterValues: User has already added this eco new to favorites.
